Credit conversion rate: 1 credit = 1 RON discount at checkout [loyalty/critical]
Credit redemption cap: max 10% of any future booking's value, identical at all three tiers [loyalty/critical]
Credit validity: 5 years from accrual, same for all tiers, with the deadline permanently visible in the account [loyalty/high]
Credits accrue automatically and instantly on each completed stay — no manual claim [loyalty/high]
